name: HATHOR-EPI-002 fail — Varicella 14 days after MMR violates 28-day inter-live window
description: MMR dose 1 at 366d, then Varicella dose 1 at 380d (14 days later). Both are live parenteral vaccines administered on different days with interval < 28 days. ACIP 4-day grace does NOT apply to this 28-day window.

recommendations.agent_rationale: Verdict on Varicella dose 1 — inter-live spacing.
recommendations.reasoning: Varicella given 14 days after MMR; both live parenteral.
